svg.title: opencode-memnet Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Client-server architecture diagram showing the OpenCode Plugin, opencode-memnet Server, PostgreSQL database, and External AI APIs with data flow connections.

svg.text: Key Insight: The Plugin is deliberately thin — it knows nothing about databases, AI, or embeddings. All intelligence lives in the Server.
